name: macaron
description: Macaron WebUI for Codex — visual session manager, GenUI builder, and multi-provider streaming chat over your ~/.codex/sessions/.

interface.shortDescription: Visual session manager + streaming GenUI for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Macaron opens a local WebUI that mirrors your Codex sessions from ~/.codex/sessions/ — browse workspaces, pin sessions to a canvas, continue any turn, and preview streaming GenUI TSX artifacts. Also bundles the genui-builder skill so Codex can author renderable UI from a prompt.
defaultPrompt: Launch the Macaron WebUI so I can browse my Codex sessions.
Use the genui-builder skill to draft a landing page as a streaming TSX artifact.
